T0178.title: Background Check Service
T0178.definition: In illicit data trading, a service that provides access to a specified individual’s personal records and background files, such as retrieving identity information, addresses, bank card numbers, and asset holdings linked to a single phone number.
T0178.description: In illicit data trading, this refers to a service offered by underground groups that can retrieve a target’s personal dossier. For example, by using a single phone number, they can look up associated identity details including residential address, bank card numbers, and assets under the person’s name. Record-checking services encompass inquiry-based lookups, decryption services, and forced account access services.

references.title: [Underground Big Data] 2024 Data Breach Risk Landscape Report
